rationale: Both correctly diagnose the tokenizer-missing-extended-ratio-token crash and give the same fix (serve Base with hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml), matching the thread resolution. X is more grounded, citing specific line ranges in both the model file and both YAML configs, quoting the YAML header text, and echoing the reporter's exact Tencent reference-code citation, plus offering a concrete degrade-gracefully code diff. Y's citations are vaguer (an approximate line number, no YAML header evidence) and its 'keep-open' disposition sits awkwardly against the maintainer's request to move tracking to a new issue, whereas X correctly frames this issue as resolved/closed with the hardening tracked separately.
